code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test27-JUL-2023Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, marked proteinuria), hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, metabolic acidosis (low CO₂), and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, glucosuria, ketonuria, bilirubinuria). These findings suggest possible acute or chronic kidney disease with metabolic derangements; diabetic ketoacidosis is unlikely given low glucose/HbA1c. Further clinical correlation and nephrology evaluation are recommended.
